acceptanceCriteria: The existing `slugify` library is adopted without rewriting its public API.
A new `deslugify(slug)` companion is added that reverses simple slugs.
Existing `slugify` tests continue to pass unchanged (no regression).
New tests cover `deslugify` and the slugify‚Üídeslugify round-trip for simple inputs.
The README documents the new function alongside the existing one.
